# 阿鑫个人 IP 配图流程

> Multi-platform Codex/Hermes/Claude/generic-agent skill for generating Axin-style personal IP article illustrations.

This repository contains a reusable illustration workflow for turning personal-brand writing, public-build notes, AI workflow documentation, GitHub README content, and project retrospectives into clean hand-drawn article images.

## Primary Entry Points

- [Skill source](axin-personal-ip-illustrations/SKILL.md): main cross-platform skill instructions.
- [Axin character](axin-personal-ip-illustrations/references/axin-ip.md): default recurring IP and action rules.
- [Style DNA](axin-personal-ip-illustrations/references/style-dna.md): white background, black hand-drawn line art, sparse red/orange/blue notes.
- [Prompt template](axin-personal-ip-illustrations/references/prompt-template.md): reusable image generation prompt with Chinese, English, and sparse bilingual modes.
- [QA checklist](axin-personal-ip-illustrations/references/qa-checklist.md): validation rules.
- [Multi-platform guide](docs/MULTI_PLATFORM.md): Codex, Hermes, Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, OpenCode, generic agents.
- [GEO guide](docs/GEO.md): search and generative engine optimization strategy.
- [Repository review](docs/REPOSITORY_REVIEW.md): deep self-review and cleanup rationale.

## Optional

- [Full LLM context](llms-full.txt): longer project summary for agents.
- [Prompt examples](examples/prompts.md): copyable prompts.
- [README](README.md): Chinese human-facing overview and screenshots.
- [README.en](README.en.md): English overview.
